subject: Discrete Random Variables
topic: §14 Probability Mass Function and Cumulative Distribution Function
question: If the cumulative distribution function of $X$ is given by $F(x) = \begin{cases} 0 & x < 2 \\ \frac{1}{36} & 2 \le x < 3 \\ \frac{3}{36} & 3 \le x < 4 \\ \frac{6}{36} & 4 \le x < 5 \\ \frac{10}{36} & 5 \le x < 6 \\ \frac{15}{36} & 6 \le x < 7 \\ \frac{21}{36} & 7 \le x < 8 \\ \frac{26}{36} & 8 \le x < 9 \\ \frac{30}{36} & 9 \le x < 10 \\ \frac{33}{36} & 10 \le x < 11 \\ \frac{35}{36} & 11 \le x < 12 \\ 1 & x \ge 12 \end{cases}$ find the probability distribution of $X$.
